Package io.github.jchejarla.springbatch.clustering.mgmt

package io.github.jchejarla.springbatch.clustering.mgmt
Cluster membership and lifecycle management.

Covers node registration and periodic heartbeats, the two-phase node lifecycle (active → unreachable → removed), and recovery of jobs whose master node was lost so a stranded execution becomes cleanly restartable rather than hanging.

  • Class
    Description
    ClusterJobRecoveryManager
    Recovers jobs whose master node has been lost from the cluster.
    ClusterNode
     
    ClusterNodeHealthCondition
     
    ClusterNodeInfo
     
    ClusterNodeManager
     
    ClusterNodeStatusChangeConditionNotifier
     
    NodeLoad
     
    NodeStatus
     
    OrphanedMasterJob
    A job whose master node has left the cluster while the job was still running.
